text.title: Acceptance Criteria Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from inputs to validated artefact.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Collect typed inputs per Prerequisites. Cite source per input.

step.name: apply-rules
step.action: Apply core rules from 01-core-rules.xml. Reject inputs that violate hard rules.
step.decision-gate: If any hard rule violated, BLOCK and route back to caller.

step.name: bind-ownership
step.action: Bind named owner / reviewer / approver (≥2 tokens) + version_tag (semver) + last_reviewed ISO date.

step.name: publish-and-trace
step.action: Commit to artefact store; emit trace-id linking to upstream task and downstream consumers.
